changes.title: Add OAuth2 authentication support
changes.description: Full OAuth2 flow with PKCE support for third-party integrations

changes.title: Fix session token refresh race condition
changes.description: Tokens could expire mid-request under high concurrency

changes.title: Optimize dashboard query performance
changes.description: Reduced P95 query time from 800ms to 120ms by adding composite indexes

changes.title: Patch XSS vulnerability in comment rendering
Remove deprecated /api/v1 endpoints
changes.description: All v1 API endpoints have been removed. Migrate to /api/v2.

changes.title: Deprecate legacy webhook format
changes.description: The old webhook payload format is deprecated and will be removed in v4.0

changes.title: Improve error messages for invalid API requests
